metadata.title: Zapia — Web Hosting Made Simple
metadata.description: Fast, reliable, and affordable web hosting for everyone. Launch your website today with Zapia's powerful hosting platform.

hero.headline: The hosting that
hero.sub: Unlimited bandwidth, automatic backups, and expert support — all in one place. No hidden fees, ever.
hero.trust_france: Hosted in France · EU data sovereignty

features.headline: Hosting that works
features.sub: Every plan comes packed with professional-grade features — no add-ons required, no surprises on your bill.

items.title: Lightning-Fast NVMe SSD
items.description: Up to 20x faster than traditional hard drives. Your visitors get sub-second page loads every time.

items.title: Global CDN
items.description: Your content served from 30+ edge locations worldwide. Faster delivery no matter where your audience is.

items.title: Free SSL Certificates
items.description: Auto-renewing Let's Encrypt SSL on every domain. HTTPS is enabled by default — no extra steps.

items.title: Daily Backups
items.description: Automatic daily snapshots kept for 30 days. Restore your entire site in one click if anything goes wrong.

items.title: Unlimited Databases
items.description: MySQL, MariaDB, and PostgreSQL with no cap on the number of databases. Scale your data however you need.

items.title: DDoS Protection
items.description: Enterprise-grade DDoS mitigation built in. Your site stays online even under heavy attack.

items.title: Real-Time Analytics
items.description: Built-in traffic analytics — track visitors, bandwidth, and performance without third-party tools.

items.title: Expert Support
items.description: Real humans, not bots. Our hosting experts are available via live chat and ticket whenever you need them.

performance.headline: Speed is not a feature —
performance.sub: Every server in our fleet runs on enterprise NVMe SSD, connected to a 10 Gbps network fabric. Your website loads in milliseconds, not seconds.
bullets: HTTP/3 and QUIC protocol support by default
Brotli compression for all static assets

metrics.label: Average TTFB
metrics.description: Time to first byte — the fastest in its class

metrics.label: Uptime (last 12 months)
metrics.description: Measured across all regions and plans

metrics.label: Storage technology
metrics.description: Cutting-edge drives, 20× faster than SATA SSD

metrics.label: Edge locations
metrics.description: Global CDN nodes for low-latency delivery

pricing.headline: Pay for what you need,
pricing.sub: 30-day money-back guarantee. No contracts, cancel anytime.
pricing.custom_desc: We design and build your website for you — from concept to launch.
pricing.custom_sub: Tailored to your project's scope and requirements.

items.q: I already have a website — can you work with it?
items.a: Absolutely. We can migrate your existing site to our infrastructure, or build you a brand-new one from scratch — whichever makes more sense for your situation.

items.q: I don't have a website yet. Where do I start?
items.a: No problem at all. We take care of everything: design, development, and launch. Just tell us about your project and we'll handle the rest.

items.q: What if I want to update the website myself?
items.a: We use Strapi as a CMS, so you can log in and edit your content whenever you need to — no technical knowledge required.
We can register a new domain for you, or keep using the one you already own — it makes no difference. Either way, everything is handled seamlessly.
We send you an invoice each billing period — monthly or yearly, depending on the plan you choose. No surprises.

items.q: Can I reach out if I need help?
items.a: Of course. You can contact us any time at contact@zapia.fr — we respond quickly.

cta.headline: Ready to launch?
cta.sub: Your brand website, designed, built, and managed by our experts — live in under a week.
cta.trust_france: Hosted in France · EU data sovereignty

footer.tagline: Fast, reliable hosting for everyone. From personal blogs to high-traffic stores.
